en.extract:
The chestnut forest rail (Rallicula rubra), also known as the chestnut forest crake, is a species of bird in the family Sarothruridae.  It is found in the Arfak Mountains and western-central New Guinea Highlands.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''chestnut forest rail''' ('''''Rallicula rubra'''''), also known as the '''chestnut forest crake''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Sarothruridae]].  It is found in the [[Arfak Mountains]] and western-central [[New Guinea Highlands]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
